title: Annulled
content:
I know I'm very late on this one but I've to record it down for future reference.

The Constitutional Court has *declared April 2, 2006 election invalid* earlier this week (May 8) and ordered a re-election. 8 of the 14 judges said that the all of the previous elections were unconstitutional.

And that means 2,200 million baht was wasted just to ... (please indulge yourself with the cursing of your choice).

The new election date is yet to be set. And this matter is far from over.

And one more thing. I guess when people say "election is the dirtiest time" ...

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/05/dirty_election/01.jpg!

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/05/dirty_election/02.jpg!

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/05/dirty_election/03.jpg!

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/05/dirty_election/04.jpg!

... they mean it literally.
